creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-02-16 17:02:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal5-token    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Tokens are small bits of text that can be placed into larger documents via
  simple placeholders, like %site-name or [user]. The Token module provides a
  central API for modules to use these tokens, and expose their own token
  values.
  
  WWW: http://drupal.org/project/token
  
  PR:             ports/120578
  Submitted by:   Jeremy Iverson <jeremy at algenta.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1979    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/www/drupal5-token/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/drupal5-token/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/drupal5-token/pkg-descr (new)
